1816920.name: Efir Adventure: Matchcraft
1816920.description:
Try yourself as a master making equipment for flying ethereal ships. And then test the ships you've created in battle!

PLAY AND COLLECT - directly participate in the process of making ships! Collect useful materials and create powerful items. The power of items will depend on your skill!

FIGHT AND WIN - assemble a warship from the items you have made and set off on a dangerous journey through the expanses of the Lumenarium universe.

DEVELOP BLUEPRINTS - Each blueprint for crafting an item can be improved and modified to suit your purposes.

EXPAND your island - Build and upgrade buildings to expand and enhance your item building capabilities.

EQUIP EXPEDITIONS - from time to time you will get the opportunity to equip expeditions to the far corners of the universe and receive a decent reward. The more generously and wisely you equip the expedition, the more worthy the reward will await you!

ADAPT to change and use changing global conditions to your advantage, whether it's a lucky trade offer or a meteor storm!
